productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Stacked White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite  round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a graphic print on the front and grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to play hard in this white Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike.
